_publications._publicationTitle: Quality of life in patients with neurofibromatosis type 1 and 2 in Canada.

_contextSnippet: The total NFTI-QoL had moderate to high correlations with the EQ-5D-5L utility score (r: −0.76, CI: −0.89, −0.49, P < .001), the EQ-5D-5L VAS score (r: −0.52, CI: −0.77, −0.11, P = .01), SF-36 PCS (r: −0.65, CI: −0.86, −0.26, P = .003), and the SF-36 MCS (r: −0.63, CI: −0.85, −0.23, P = .004).
details: Moderate to high correlations with EQ-5D-5L utility score (r=-0.76, P<0.001), EQ-5D-5L VAS score (r=-0.52, P=0.01), SF-36 PCS (r=-0.65, P=0.003), and SF-36 MCS (r=-0.63, P=0.004).
